recommendations.title: Mardaani
recommendations.overview: A Mumbai police officer's search for a missing teenage girl leads her to the depraved world of child trafficking. What follows is a cat-and-mouse game between the officer and a ruthless mafia kingpin.

recommendations.title: The Saragossa Manuscript
recommendations.overview: During the Napoleonic wars, a Spanish officer and an opposing officer find a book written by the former's grandfather.

recommendations.title: Mystery Team
recommendations.overview: A group of former Encyclopedia Brown-style child-detectives struggle to solve an adult mystery.

recommendations.title: Shelby Oaks
recommendations.overview: A woman's obsessive search for her missing sister leads her into a terrifying mystery at the hands of an unknown evil.

recommendations.title: And Soon the Darkness
recommendations.overview: Two young English women go on a cycling tour of the French countryside. When one of them goes missing, the other begins to search for her. But who can she trust?

recommendations.title: Wind River
recommendations.overview: An FBI agent teams with the town's veteran game tracker to investigate a murder that occurred on a Native American reservation.

recommendations.title: Ordinary People
recommendations.overview: A gym teacher and his female student look for her missing friend. But as they investigate, they find that her disappearance is a part of a larger conspiracy.

recommendations.title: Kahaani
recommendations.overview: Pregnant and alone in the city of Kolkata, a woman begins a relentless search for her missing husband, only to find that nothing is what it seems.

recommendations.title: Body Cam
recommendations.overview: As a police officer investigates the gruesome murder of her colleague, she discovers that a mysterious supernatural force is behind it.

recommendations.title: The Hands of Orlac
recommendations.overview: A world-famous pianist loses both hands in an accident. When new hands are grafted on, he is horrified to learn they once belonged to a murderer.
